reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pKNGRtaGFMVEUwUkhCdVRtUlpSakY2Y1cxc2JVRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atencion sumamente paupérrima y desagradable, acabo de pasar y de verdad una atencion que deja mucho que desear.

En primer lugar ni saludan al llegar ni te prestan atencion, llegue frene abri mi tapa de tanque y tuve que esperar que el playero diera varias vueltas cargando los demas autos a mi alrededor todo bien con eso, pero lo que me parece mal es que pases a mi lado donde ni me saluda en principio me mira y ni ( un momento porfavor) ni eso se último.

Segundo playeros con un mal aspecto total y unas cara de orto que no te quedan ganas de volver para nada.

El que me atendio segun su gafete tapado encima que casi no podia leer su nombre si no ponia atencion,  Gonzales Jorge ( malisima atencion y aspecto )

(Translated by Google)
The service was extremely poor and unpleasant. I just went through and it truly left much to be desired.

First of all, they don't even greet you when you arrive, nor do they pay any attention to you. I pulled up, opened my gas cap, and had to wait while the attendant circled around several times filling up the other cars around me. That's fine, but what I find unacceptable is that he walks right past me and doesn't even greet me. He barely looks at me and doesn't even say "just a moment, please."

Secondly, the attendants looked completely unkempt and had such sour faces that you wouldn't want to return for anything.

The one who served me, according to his badge, which was covered up and so bad I could barely read his name unless I was looking closely, was Jorge Gonzales (terrible service and appearance).

reviewReply.comment: Buen dia Daniel, lamentamos mucho la mala experiencia de servicio que obtuviste, estamos trabajando para remediarlo, te esperamos nuevamente en YPF ACA Belgrano.
